    class z2 {

    class L2 {
        constructor({deviceUuid: t, endpointId: n, sessionUuid: r, traceUuid: s, apiEndpoint: o, taskAction: i, initialData: a})
        {

                    message: "there is no initial data"
                });

            }

            l.some(h => h && this.hasQuizBehaviour(h.formId)) || (l.length === 0 ? pn.actions.recordQuizDecision({

                    p;

                        internalId: h.internalId
                    }),

                }

                    message: "there is no available quiz"
                })
            }),

                quiz: h,
                taskAction: i,

                endpointId: n,
                sessionUuid: r,

            })),
            A2(this)
        }
        get renderedItem()
        {
            return this.items.find(t => t.isRendering || t.rendered)
        }
        tryRenderItem({id: t, force: n})
        {
            const r = this.items.find(o => o.quiz.internalId === t);
            if (!r || this.hasQuizBehaviour(r.quiz.formId))
                return;
            n === void 0 ? this.renderItemWithPersonalization({
                item: r
            }) : this.renderItem({
                item: r,
                force: n != null ? n : !0
            })
        }
        hasQuizBehaviour(t)
        {
            var n,
                r,
                s,
                o,
                i,
                a;
            return (a = (i = (o = (s = (r = (n = Ye()) == null ? void 0 : n.getModel) == null ? void 0 : r.call(n, t)) == null ? void 0 : s.template) == null ? void 0 : o.behaviors) == null ? void 0 : i.includes("quiz")) != null ? a : !1
        }
        renderItemWithPersonalization({item: t})
        {
            var r;
            if (this.renderedItem) {
                if (this.renderedItem.quiz.internalId === t.quiz.internalId)
                    return;
                this.renderedItem.destroy()
            }
            const n = window == null ? void 0 : window.PopMechanic;
            (r = n == null ? void 0 : n.show) == null || r.call(n, t.quiz.formId, !0)
        }
        renderItem({item: t, force: n})
        {
            if (this.renderedItem) {
                if (this.renderedItem.quiz.internalId === t.quiz.internalId)
                    return;
                this.renderedItem.destroy()
            }
            t.render(n)
        }
        isItemReadyToShow(t)
        {
            return this.items.some(n => n.quiz.internalId === t)
        }
        reset()
        {
            this.items.forEach(t => t.destroy()),
            this.items = []
        }
    }
    const E2 = async e => {

0) return;\n\n      this.#currentFrame.hide();\n      this.#currentFrameIndex--;\n\n      this.#frames[this.#currentFrameIndex + 1].unmarkAsCompleted();\n\n      this.#currentFrame.start({\n #elapsedTime = 0;\n\n  constructor({ duration }) {\n    this.#duration = duration;\n\n    this.#render();\n  }\n\n  #render() {\n    const root = document.createElement(\"div\");\n    root.className =    if (timeLeft < 0) return this.#duration;\n\n    return timeLeft;\n  }\n\n  #triggerReflow() {\n    this.#fill.offsetWidth;\n  }\n\n  activate() {\n    this.unmarkAsCompleted();\n    this.#triggerReflow();\n    this.resume();\n  }\n\n  pause() {\n    this.#elapsedTime += +Date.now() - this.#resumeTs;\n    this.#fill.style.width = (this.#elapsedTime / this.#duration) * 100 + \"%\";\n    this.#fill.style.transitionDuration = \"0ms\";\n  }\n\n  resume() {\n    this.#fill.style.transitionDuration = (this.#duration - this.#elapsedTime) + \"ms\";\n    this.#fill.style.width = #loader = null;\n\n  constructor({ story, settings }) {\n    super({ story });\n    this.settings = settings;\n  }\n\n  get duration() {\n    return this.settings?.imageDuration ?? 5000;\n  }\n\n #loadImage(src) {\n    const image = this.#image;\n    if (!src || !image) return;\n\n    const cached = ImageCache.get(src) ?? ImageCache.preload(src);\n\n    try {\n      await cached.decode?.();\n    } catch (_) {}\n\n    if (image !== this.#image) return;\n\n    image.src = cached.src;\n  }\n\n  async start({ nextStory, signal } = {}) {\n    if (signal?.aborted) return;\n\n    if (nextStory?.imageUrl) {\n      ImageCache.preload(nextStory.imageUrl);\n    }\n\n    if (!this.#container || !this.#image) return;\n\n Promise((resolve) => {\n      if (!this.#image) return resolve();\n\n      if (this.#image.complete && this.#image.naturalWidth > 0) {\n        return resolve();\n      }\n\n      if (signal?.aborted) return resolve();\n\n      const onLoad = () => {\n        cleanup();\n        resolve();\n      };\n\n      const onAbort = () => {\n        cleanup();\n        resolve();\n      };\n\n      const cleanup = () => {\n        this.#image?.removeEventListener(\"load\", onLoad);\n        signal?.removeEventListener(\"abort\", onAbort);\n      };\n\n      this.#image.addEventListener(\"load\", onLoad, { once: true });\n\n      if (signal) {\n        signal.addEventListener(\"abort\", onAbort, { once: true });\n      }\n    });\n  }\n\n  pause() {}\n  resume() {}\n\n  #isValidManualCrop(cropType, crop) {\n    return (\n      cropType === \"manual\" &&\n      crop &&\n      crop.width > 0 &&\n      crop.height > 0 &&\n      crop.imageWidth > 0 &&\n      crop.imageHeight > 0\n    );\n  }\n\n  #renderImageElement() {\n    if (!this.#image || !this.story.imageUrl) return;\n\n    const imageElement = document.createElement('div');\n    imageElement.classList.add('story-image-img');\n    imageElement.style.backgroundImage = \"url(\" + this.story.imageUrl + \")\";\n\n    return imageElement;\n  }\n\n  #fitImageElement() {\n    if                         encodeData: function(t) {

                        },
                        decodeData: function(t) {
                            try {
                                return decodeURIComponent(t.replace(new RegExp("^" + er), "")).replace(/\%21/g, "!").replace(/\%7E/g, "~").replace(/\%2A/g, "*").replace(/\%27/g, "'").replace(/\%28/g, "(").replace(/\%29/g, ")")
                            } catch (e) {
                                try {
                                    return unescape(t)
                                } catch (n) {
                                    return ""
                                }
                            }
                        },

                class ko {

                    }

                function Ho({error: t, source: e, form: n}) {

                class Wo extends ko {
                    constructor()
                    {
                        super(...arguments),
                        this.variables = Uo,
                        this.success = void 0
                    }
                    onRender(t, e)
                    {
                        return this.executeLifecycleMethod("on_render", {
                            form: t,
                            view: e
                        })
                    }
                    onShow(t)
                    {
                        return this.executeLifecycleMethod("on_show", {
                            form: t.form
                        })
                    }
                    onClose(t)
                    {
                        return this.success ? this.executeLifecycleMethod("on_close_success", {
                            form: t.form
                        }) : this.executeLifecycleMethod("on_close_fail", {
                            form: t.form
                        })
                    }
                    onContactsSent(t)
                    {
                        return this.success = !0, this.executeLifecycleMethod("on_success", {
                            form: t.form,
                            lead: t.lead
                        })
                    }
                    onTargetingReady(t)
                    {
                        return this.executeLifecycleMethod("on_targeting", {
                            form: t.form
                        })
                    }
                    stringHasVariable(t, e)
                    {
                        return -1 !== t.indexOf("%" + e + "%")
                    }
                    getRequiredVariables(t)
                    {
                        return this.variables.filter(({key: e}) => this.stringHasVariable(t, e))
                    }
                    async getVariablesValues(t)
                    {
                        const e = this.getRequiredVariables(t),
                            n = e.map(t => Promise.resolve(t.fetch())),
                            i = await Promise.all(n);
                        return e.reduce((t, e, n) => (t[e.key] = i[n], t), {})
                    }
                    interpolateWithVariables(t, e, n)
                    {
                        let i = this._interpolate(t, e);
                        return Object.keys(n).forEach(t => {
                            i = i.replace(new RegExp("%" + t + "%", "g"), "(JSON.parse('" + JSON.stringify(n[t]) + "'))")
                        }), i
                    }
                    async executeLifecycleMethod(t, e)
                    {
                        const n = this.data[t] || "";
                        if (n && (!e.form || !e.form.isControlGroup))
                            try {
                                const t = await this.getVariablesValues(n),
                                    i = this.interpolateWithVariables(n, e, t);
                                return e.lead ? await new Function("lead", "form", i)(e.lead, e.form) : e.view ? await new Function("form", "view", i)(e.form, e.view) : await new Function("form", i)(e.form)
                            } catch (i) {
                                const n = `${t} error in integration#${this.data.id}, form#${e.form.id}`;
                                Nr.log(n, i),
                                Ho({
                                    error: i,
                                    source: `integration.javascript.${t}`,
                                    form: e.form
                                })
                            }
                    }
                }

                class Jo extends ko {

                    async trackTargeting(t)
                    {

                                omitCdpAction: t.form.isControlGroup
                            }))
                        }
                    }
                    async trackShow(t)
                    {

                                return;

                                omitCdpAction: t.form.isControlGroup
                            }))
                        }
                    }

                                return;

                const Qs = {

                    }

                    {
                        return this.pendingItems.filter(t => !this.hasItemBatched(t))
                    }
                    hasNotBatchedItems()
                    {

                const ya = {
                        $in: (t, e) => !!Array.isArray(t) && t.some(t => t === e),
                        $nin: (t, e) => !Array.isArray(t) || !t.some(t => t === e),
                        $in_contains: (t, e) => ga(ya.$contains)(t, e),

                            })

                                formId: e.id,

                                    error: n
                                }
                            }),
                            Nr.error({
                                error: `conditions error in form#${e.id}`,

                                    cause: n,

                                }
                            })

                    }

                const mu = cn.CSS_PREFIX + "copy-success";
                class gu extends iu {
                    constructor(t, e)
                    {
                        super(t, e),
                        this.name = "copy-code"
                    }
                    onShow(t)
                    {
                        try {
                            this.$elem = t;
                            t[0].querySelectorAll("[data-" + cn.CSS_PREFIX + "copy]").forEach(t => {
                                t.addEventListener("click", this._getHandleCopy()),
                                t.addEventListener("blur", this._getHandleBlur())
                            })
                        } catch {}
                    }
                    _getHandleBlur()
                    {
                        const t = this;
                        return function() {
                            const e = this;
                            if (!(e instanceof HTMLElement))
                                return;
                            const n = e.dataset[cn.DATASET_PREFIX + "Copy"],
                                i = t.$elem.find("[data-" + cn.CSS_PREFIX + 'copy-source="' + n + '"]');
                            An(e).removeClass(mu),
                            i.removeClass(mu)
                        }
                    }
                    _getHandleCopy()
                    {
                        return t => {
                            t.preventDefault();
                            const e = t.currentTarget;
                            if (e instanceof HTMLElement)
                                try {
                                    const t = e.dataset[cn.DATASET_PREFIX + "Copy"],
                                        n = this.$elem.find("[data-" + cn.CSS_PREFIX + 'copy-source="' + t + '"]');
                                    let i = n.text() || "";
                                    if (i = i.trim(), navigator.clipboard)
                                        navigator.clipboard.writeText(i).then(() => {
                                            An(e).addClass(mu),
                                            n.addClass(mu)
                                        }).catch(t => {
                                            Nr.log("CopyCodeBehavior: failed to copy code", t)
                                        });
                                    else {
                                        const t = document.createElement("textarea");
                                        t.value = i,
                                        t.setAttribute("readonly", ""),
                                        t.style.position = "absolute",
                                        t.style.left = "-9999px",
                                        document.body.appendChild(t),
                                        t.select(),
                                        t.setSelectionRange(0, i.length + 1),
                                        document.execCommand("copy"),
                                        document.body.removeChild(t),
                                        An(e).addClass(mu),
                                        n.addClass(mu)
                                    }
                                } catch {}
                        }
                    }
                }
                const yu = ({$element: t, $target: e, placement: n}) => {
                    const i = "#" + t[0].id;
                    switch (n) {
                    case "before":
                        {
                            const n = e.prev();
                            n && An(n).is(i) && n.remove(),
                            e.before(t);
                            break
                        }case "after":
                        {
                            const n = e.next();
                            n && An(n).is(i) && n.remove(),
                            e.after(t);
                            break
                        }case "start":
                        {
                            const n = e.children()[0];
                            n && An(n).is(i) && n.remove(),
                            e.prepend(t);
                            break
                        }case "replaceContent":
                        e.empty(),
                        e.append(t);
                        break;
                    case "replaceElement":
                        e.replaceWith(t);
                        break;
                    default:
                        {
                            const n = e.children(),
                                r = e.children()[n.length - 1];
                            r && An(r).is(i) && r.remove(),
                            e.append(t)
                        }
                    }

                class Pu {
                    constructor(t)

                function Eu({value: t, selection: e}, n) {
                    const [i, r] = e;

                class $u {
                    constructor()
                    {
                        this.now = null,
                        this.past = [],
                        this.future = []
                    }
                    undo()
                    {
                        const t = this.past.pop();
                        t && this.now && (this.future.push(this.now), this.updateElement(t, "historyUndo"))
                    }
                    redo()
                    {
                        const t = this.future.pop();
                        t && this.now && (this.past.push(this.now), this.updateElement(t, "historyRedo"))
                    }
                    updateHistory(t)
                    {
                        if (!this.now)
                            return void (this.now = t);
                        const e = this.now.value !== t.value,
                            n = this.now.selection.some((e, n) => e !== t.selection[n]);
                        (e || n) && (e && (this.past.push(this.now), this.future = []), this.now = t)
                    }
                    updateElement(t, e)
                    {
                        this.now = t,
                        this.updateValue(t.value, {
                            inputType: e,
                            data: null
                        }),
                        this.updateSelectionRange(t.selection)
                    }
                }
                function Ru(t) {
                    return "string" == typeof t
                }
                function Ou(t, e, n) {
                    let i = null,
                        r = null;
                    const o = Array.from(t.value).reduce((o, s, a) => {
                        const c = function(t, e, n, i) {
                                let r = "";
                                for (let o = e.length; o < t.length; o++) {
                                    const e = t[o],
                                        s = i.value[o] === e;
                                    if (!Ru(e) || e === n && !s)
                                        return r;
                                    r += e
                                }
                                return r
                            }(e, o, s, n),
                            u = o + c,
                            l = e[u.length];
                        return Ru(l) ? u + l : s.match(l) ? (null === i && a >= t.selection[0] && (i = u.length), null === r && a >= t.selection[1] && (r = u.length), u + s) : u
                    }, "");
                    return {
                        value: o,
                        selection: [null != i ? i : o.length, null != r ? r : o.length]
                    }
                }
                function Fu(t, e, n=t) {
                    if (function(t, e) {
                        return Array.isArray(e) ? t.length <= e.length && Array.from(t).every((t, n) => {
                            const i = e[n];
                            return Ru(i) ? t === i : t.match(i)
                        }) : e.test(t)
                    }(t.value, e))
                        return t;

                            s = r;

                            value: Array.from(t).reduce((t, e, a) => {

                            }, ""),
                            selection: [o, s]
                        }
                    }(t, e);
                    return {
                        selection: r,
                        value: Array.isArray(e) ? i.slice(0, e.length) : i
                    }
                }
                function Au(t, e) {
                    if (!Array.isArray(e))
                        return t;

                        r = [],
                        o = Array.from(t.value).reduce((t, o, s) => {
                            const a = e[s];
                            return s === n && r.push(t.length), s === i && r.push(t.length), Ru(a) && a === o ? t : t + o
                        }, "");

                        value: o,
                        selection: [r[0], r[1]]
                    }
                }
                class Mu {
                    constructor(t, e)
                    {
                        this.initialElementState = t,
                        this.maskOptions = e,
                        this.value = "",
                        this.selection = [0, 0];
                        const {value: n, selection: i} = Fu(t, this.getMaskExpression(t));
                        this.value = n,
                        this.selection = i
                    }
                    addCharacters([t, e], n)
                    {
                        const {value: i} = this,
                            r = this.getMaskExpression({
                                value: i.slice(0, t) + n + i.slice(e),
                                selection: [t + n.length, t + n.length]
                            }),
                            o = {
                                value: i,
                                selection: [t, e]
                            },
                            s = Au(o, r),

                                const [r, o] = e;

                        }(this, d))
                            throw new Error("Invalid mask value");
                        this.value = d.value,
                        this.selection = d.selection
                    }
                    deleteCharacters([t, e])
                    {
                        if (t === e || !e)
                            return;

                            i = this.getMaskExpression({
                                value: n.slice(0, t) + n.slice(e),

                                selection: [s, s]
                            }, i, r);

                        this.selection = c.selection
                    }
                    getMaskExpression(t)
                    {
                        const {mask: e} = this.maskOptions;
                        return "function" == typeof e ? e(t) : e
                    }

                const ju = {
                    mask: /^.*$/,

                    postprocessor: Tu,

                class Du extends $u {
                    constructor(t, e)
                    {
                        super(),

                        }),
                        !function(t) {

                        })) : this.eventListener.listen("beforeinput", t => {

                            case "historyUndo":
                                return t.preventDefault(), this.undo();
                            case "historyRedo":
                                return t.preventDefault(), this.redo();
                            case "deleteContentBackward":
                            case "deleteWordBackward":
                            case "deleteByCut":
                                return this.handleDelete(t, !1);
                            case "deleteContentForward":
                            case "deleteWordForward":
                                return this.handleDelete(t, !0);
                            case "insertFromDrop":
                                return;
                            case "insertLineBreak":
                                return this.handleEnter(t);
                            default:
                                return this.handleInsert(t, t.data || "")
                            }
                        }),
                        this.eventListener.listen("input", () => {
                            this.conformValueToMask(),
                            this.updateHistory(this.elementState)
                        })
                    }
                    get elementState()
                    {
                        const {value: t, selectionStart: e, selectionEnd: n} = this.element;
                        return {
                            value: t,
                            selection: [e || 0, n || 0]
                        }
                    }
                    get isTextArea()
                    {
                        return "TEXTAREA" === this.element.nodeName
                    }
                    destroy()
                    {
                        this.eventListener.destroy()
                    }
                    updateSelectionRange([t, e])
                    {

                            i;

                    }
                    updateValue(t, e={
                        inputType: "insertText",
                        data: null
                    })
                    {

                            this.element.value = t,
                            (null == n ? void 0 : n.InputEvent) && this.element.dispatchEvent(new InputEvent("input", Object.assign(Object.assign({}, e), {
                                bubbles: !0,
                                cancelable: !0
                            })))
                        }
                    }
                    handleKeydown(t)
                    {
                        const e = t.key;
                        switch (e) {
                        case "Backspace":
                        case "Delete":
                            return this.handleDelete(t, "Delete" === e);
                        case "Enter":
                            return this.handleEnter(t)
                        }
                        (function({key: t, ctrlKey: e, metaKey: n, altKey: i}) {

                                o = /^.$/u.test(t);

                    conformValueToMask()
                    {
                        const {value: t, selection: e} = function(t, e) {
                            const n = Object.assign(Object.assign({}, ju), e),

                                    value: t,
                                    selection: [0, 0]
                                } : t,

                                    elementState: i,
                                    data: ""

                                {value: s, selection: a} = n.postprocessor(o, i);
                            return "string" == typeof t ? s : {
                                value: s,
                                selection: a
                            }
                        }(this.elementState, this.options);
                        this.updateValue(t),
                        this.updateSelectionRange(e)
                    }
                    handleDelete(t, e)
                    {
                        const n = {
                                value: this.elementState.value,
                                selection: Eu(this.elementState, e)
                            },

                            {elementState: o} = this.options.preprocessor({
                                elementState: n,
                                data: ""

                        s.deleteCharacters([a, c]);

                        if (n.value.slice(0, i) + n.value.slice(r) === u.value)
                            return;
                        if (t.preventDefault(), function(t, ...e) {
                            return e.every(({value: e}) => e === t.value)
                        }(n, o, s, u))
                            return this.updateSelectionRange(e ? [c, c] : [a, a]);
                        const l = e ? "deleteContentForward" : "deleteContentBackward";
                        this.updateValue(u.value, {
                            inputType: "inputType" in t ? t.inputType : l,
                            data: null
                        }),
                        this.updateSelectionRange(u.selection),
                        this.updateHistory(u)
                    }
                    handleInsert(t, e)
                    {
                        const n = this.elementState,
                            {elementState: i, data: r=e} = this.options.preprocessor({
                                data: e,
                                elementState: n
                            }, "insert"),
                            o = new Mu(i, this.options);
                        try {
                            o.addCharacters(i.selection, r)
                        } catch (d) {
                            return t.preventDefault()

                        const [s, a] = i.selection,
                            c = i.value.slice(0, s) + e + i.value.slice(a),

                        c !== u && (t.preventDefault(), this.updateValue(u, {
                            data: e,
                            inputType: "inputType" in t ? t.inputType : "insertText"
                        }), this.updateSelectionRange(l), this.updateHistory({
                            value: u,
                            selection: l
                        }))
                    }
                    handleEnter(t)
                    {
                        this.isTextArea && this.handleInsert(t, "\n")
                    }
                }
                const Nu = cn.CSS_PREFIX + "phone-mask",
                    qu = /\d/;
                function Lu(t) {
                    return t.split("").map(function(t) {
                        return "#" === t ? qu : t
                    })
                }
                const Bu = {
                    mask: ["+"],
                    stringMask: "+"
                };
                function zu(t) {

                        n = e.map(t => "string" == typeof t && /\d/.test(t) ? /\d/ : t),
                        i = e.filter(t => "string" != typeof t || qu.test(t));
                    return {
                        testMask: e,
                        mask: n,
                        stringMask: t.mask,
                        filter: i,
                        disallowedPrefix: t.disallowedPrefix
                    }
                }
                const Uu = Cu.map(zu);
                const Hu = new Promise(t => {
                        An(document).ready(() => {

                    Wu = [];
                function Xu(t, e) {
                    const n = Lu(e);
                    An(t).each((t, e) => {
                        if (!(e instanceof HTMLInputElement || e instanceof HTMLTextAreaElement))
                            return;
                        const i = new Du(e, {
                            mask: n,
                            overwriteMode: "shift"
                        });
                        Wu.push(i)
                    })
                }
                function Vu(t, e, n) {
                    An(t).each((t, i) => {
                        if (!(i instanceof HTMLInputElement || i instanceof HTMLTextAreaElement))
                            return;
                        const r = new Du(i, {
                            mask: t => {
                                const r = t.value ? function(t, e, n) {
                                    if (0 === (t = t.replace(/\D/g, "")).length)
                                        return null;
                                    try {
                                        const i = e.map(zu).concat(Uu).filter(e => function(t, e, n) {
                                            if (t.disallowedPrefix && e.startsWith(t.disallowedPrefix))
                                                return !1;
                                            if (n && t.stringMask.startsWith("+") && !t.stringMask.startsWith(n))
                                                return !1;
                                            for (let i = 0; i < e.length; i++) {
                                                const n = t.filter?.[i];
                                                if (void 0 === n)
                                                    return !1;
                                                if ("string" == typeof n) {
                                                    if (n !== e[i])
                                                        return !1
                                                } else if (!n.test(e[i]))
                                                    return !1
                                            }
                                            return !0
                                        }(e, t, n)).sort((t, e) => {
                                            const n = t => t.filter.filter(function(t) {
                                                return "string" != typeof t
                                            }).length - (t.stringMask.startsWith("+") ? 0 : 10) - t.filter.filter(function(t) {
                                                return "string" == typeof t && /\d/.test(t)
                                            }).length;
                                            return n(t) - n(e)
                                        });
                                        return i[0] || null
                                    } catch {
                                        return null
                                    }
                                }(t.value, e, n) : Bu;
                                if (r)
                                    return An(i).data(Nu, r.stringMask), r.mask;
                                return Lu(An(i).data(Nu) || "+")
                            },
                            overwriteMode: "shift"
                        });
                        Wu.push(r)
                    })
                }
                Jr.on("destroy", function() {
                    for (; Wu.length > 0;) {
                        Wu.pop().destroy()
                    }
                });
                const Gu = {
                        common: function(t, e) {
                            Xu(t, e)
                        },
                        phones: function(t, e, n) {

                        dates: function(t) {

                                    return !1;

                                        return !1
                                }

                            }(Lu(e = e || An(t).data(Nu)), An(t).val())
                        },

                class cl extends iu {
                    constructor(t, e)
                    {
                        super(t, e),
                        this._sending = !1,
                        this.fields = [],
                        this.fieldNamesInHtml = [],
                        this._canSubmit = !0,
                        this._$elem = null,
                        this._view = null,
                        this._showSuccess = !0,
                        this._sent = !1,
                        this._phoneSettings = {
                            mode: "geo-guess"
                        },
                        this._requiredFields = ["name", "email", "phone"],
                        this.fields = [],
                        this.fieldNamesInHtml = [],
                        this._phoneSettings = function(t) {
                            let e = {
                                mode: "complete"
                            };
                            if (!("settings" in t.form.settings))
                                return e;
                            const n = Object.keys(t.form.settings.settings);
                            for (let r = 0; r < n.length; r++) {
                                const i = n[r],
                                    o = t.form.settings.settings[i];
                                if (Array.isArray(o)) {
                                    o.some(function(t) {
                                        "phone" === t.systemName && (e = t.phoneSettings || e)
                                    });
                                    break
                                }
                            }
                            const i = t.form.settings.behavior_settings.lead || t.form.settings.behavior_settings["lead-on-close"];

                class Tl {
                    constructor(t, e)
                    {

                    }

                    }

                    }

                    {

                    }
                    goNext()
                    {
                        const t = this.currentQuestion;
                        if (!t)
                            return this.phase = "finished", void this.onStateChange();
                        const e = this.answers.getAll().find(e => e.question === t.systemName),
                            n = e?.answer,

                        }(t, n ?? "");

                    }
                    goPrev()

                    }
                    finish()
                    {

                    }
                    restart()
                    {

                const $l = t => "single" === t.type || "multiple" === t.type || "scale" === t.type,
                    Rl = (t, e, n) => {
                        if (!n || 0 === n.length)
                            return;
                        if (1 === n.length)
                            return n[0];
                        const i = ((t, e) => {
                                const n = [];
                                for (const {question: i, answer: r} of e) {
                                    const e = t.find(t => t.systemName === i);
                                    if (!e || !$l(e))
                                        continue;
                                    const o = Array.isArray(r) ? r : [r];
                                    for (const t of o) {
                                        const i = e.options.find(e => e.value === t);
                                        i?.tags && n.push(...i.tags)
                                    }
                                }
                                return n
                            })(e, t),
                            r = new Set(i.map(t => t.id)),
                            o = [];
                        for (const a of n) {
                            if (!a.tags || 0 === a.tags.length)
                                continue;
                            if (!a.tags.every(t => r.has(t)))
                                continue;
                            const t = i.filter(t => a.tags.includes(t.id)).reduce((t, e) => t + e.weight, 0);
                            o.push({
                                weight: t,
                                final: a
                            })
                        }
                        if (0 === o.length)
                            return n[0];
                        o.sort((t, e) => e.weight - t.weight);
                        const s = o[0].weight;
                        return o.filter(t => t.weight === s).length > 1 ? n[0] : o[0].final
                    };
                function Ol(t) {
                    const {endpointId: e, quizId: n, quizType: i, type: r, status: o, duration: s, answersCount: a, productsCount: c} = t;
                    try {
                        const t = new URL("/quiz-products-recommend-metrics", Bc);
                        t.searchParams.set("e", e),
                        t.searchParams.set("q", n),
                        t.searchParams.set("qt", i),
                        t.searchParams.set("t", r),
                        t.searchParams.set("s", o),
                        t.searchParams.set("r_ft", String(Math.max(0, Math.round(s)))),
                        t.searchParams.set("ac", String(a)),
                        void 0 !== c && t.searchParams.set("pc", String(c));
                        (new Image).src = t.toString()
                    } catch (u) {
                        Nr.error({
                            error: "Could not send recommend metrics",
                            context: {
                                cause: u
                            }
                        })
                    }
                }
                class Fl {
                    constructor(t)
                    {
                        const {traceUuid: e, sessionUuid: n, deviceUuid: i, endpointId: r, quizId: o, categoryId: s} = t;
                        this.endpointId = r,
                        this.quizId = o,
                        this.headers = {
                            "Content-Type": "application/json",
                            "x-location": window.location.href,
                            "x-session-uuid": n,
                            "x-trace-uuid": e,
                            "x-user-uid": i,
                            "x-client-id": r,
                            "x-wizard-id": o,
                            "x-wizard-category-id": s
                        }
                    }
                    async fetchPreview(t, e)
                    {
                        const n = performance.now();
                        try {
                            const i = await fetch(`${io}/api/v0/preview`, {
                                method: "POST",
                                headers: this.headers,
                                body: JSON.stringify({
                                    answers: t
                                }),
                                signal: e
                            });
                            if (!i.ok)
                                throw new Error(`HTTP ${i.status}`);
                            const r = await i.json(),
                                o = performance.now() - n;
                            return Ol({
                                endpointId: this.endpointId,
                                quizId: this.quizId,
                                quizType: "matcher",
                                type: "preview",
                                status: "success",
                                duration: o,
                                answersCount: t.length,
                                productsCount: r.items.length
                            }), r
                        } catch (i) {
                            throw "AbortError" === i?.name || Ol({
                                endpointId: this.endpointId,
                                quizId: this.quizId,
                                quizType: "matcher",
                                type: "preview",
                                status: "failed",
                                duration: performance.now() - n,
                                answersCount: t.length
                            }), i
                        }
                    }
                    async fetchRecommend(t, e, n)
                    {
                        const i = performance.now();
                        try {
                            const r = await fetch(`${io}/api/v0/recommend`, {
                                method: "POST",
                                headers: this.headers,
                                body: JSON.stringify({
                                    answers: t,
                                    deviceType: e
                                }),
                                signal: n
                            });
                            if (!r.ok)
                                throw new Error(`HTTP ${r.status}`);
                            const o = await r.json(),
                                s = performance.now() - i;
                            return Ol({
                                endpointId: this.endpointId,
                                quizId: this.quizId,
                                quizType: "matcher",
                                type: "recommend",
                                status: "success",
                                duration: s,
                                answersCount: t.length,
                                productsCount: o.items.length
                            }), o
                        } catch (r) {
                            throw "AbortError" === r?.name || Ol({
                                endpointId: this.endpointId,
                                quizId: this.quizId,
                                quizType: "matcher",
                                type: "recommend",
                                status: "failed",
                                duration: performance.now() - i,
                                answersCount: t.length
                            }), r
                        }
                    }

                function ad(t) {

                }
                function cd(t) {

                        return window;

                    }

                }

                }

                const hd = {

                function wd(t, e, n) {

                class ph extends Vl {
                    constructor(t)
                    {

                        this._popper = null
                    }
                    shouldRender()
                    {
                        return !0
                    }
                    onRender()
                    {
                        return new Promise(t => {
                            const e = setInterval(() => {
                                this.getTargetElement() && (clearInterval(e), t())
                            }, 100);
                            Jr.one("destroy", () => {

                            })
                        })

                    {

                        n.append(t),
                        this.initPopper(i[0]),
                        await eu(i, this.settings.animation_in),
                        this._targetElementCheckingIntervalId = setInterval(() => {
                            const t = this.getTargetElement();

                            !t || e.filterVisible().length || this._popper || (e.show(), this.initPopper(i[0]))
                        }, 100)
                    }
                    async onClose(t)
                    {

                            n = dh(t);
                        try {
                            await eu(e, this.settings.animation_out),
                            n.remove(),
                            e.css({
                                position: "static",
                                height: 0,
                                minHeight: 0,
                                overflow: "visible"
                            }),
                            this.clearPopper(),
                            this._targetElementCheckingIntervalId && (clearInterval(this._targetElementCheckingIntervalId), this._targetElementCheckingIntervalId = null)
                        } catch {
                            this.clearPopper()
                        }
                    }
                    getTargetElement()
                    {
                        return An(this.settings.target)[0]
                    }
                    createWrappers(t)
                    {

                        e.css({
                            outline: "none",

                        }
                    }

                                name: "flip",
                                enabled: !1
                            }, {
                                name: "offset",

                                            r = 0;

                                            return -1 !== t.indexOf("top") || -1 !== t.indexOf("bottom")

                                            return -1 !== t.indexOf("end")
                                        }(t) && (i *= -1), [i, r]
                                    }(t, this.settings.element_horizontal_offset, this.settings.element_vertical_offset)
                                }
                            }]
                        })
                    }
                    clearPopper()
                    {
                        this._popper && (this._popper.destroy(), this._popper = null)
                    }

                const xh = new class {
                    constructor(t)
                    {
                        this.location = t,
                        this.ids = new Set,
                        this.idsWithGroup = new Set
                    }
                    checkLocation(t)
                    {
                        return this.location === t
                    }
                    setLocation(t)
                    {
                        this.checkLocation(t) || (this.location = t, this.ids.clear(), this.idsWithGroup.clear())
                    }
                    has(t)
                    {
                        return this.ids.has(t.toString())
                    }
                    hasGroup(t)
                    {
                        for (const [e, n] of Object.entries(t)) {
                            const t = this.getKeyForIdAndGroup(e, n);
                            if (this.idsWithGroup.has(t))
                                return !0
                        }
                        return !1
                    }
                    store(t)
                    {
                        this.ids.add(t.toString())
                    }
                    storeGroup(t)
                    {
                        for (const [e, n] of Object.entries(t)) {
                            const t = this.getKeyForIdAndGroup(e, n);
                            this.idsWithGroup.add(t)
                        }
                    }
                    getKeyForIdAndGroup(t, e)
                    {
                        return JSON.stringify([t.toString().toLowerCase(), e.toString()])
                    }
                }

                        this.trySendGa4Event = t.trySendGa4Event
                    }
                    selectItem(t, e, n)
                    {
                        this.sendProductEvent("select_item", {
                            product: t,
                            index: e,
                            props: n
                        })
                    }
                    viewItemList(t, e, n)
                    {
                        this.sendProductEvent("view_item_list", {
                            product: t,
                            index: e,
                            props: n
                        })
                    }
                    sendProductEvent(t, {product: e, index: n, props: i})
                    {
                        const r = this.transform(e, n);
                        if (!r)
                            return;
                        const o = {
                                item_list_name: this.listName,
                                items: [r]
                            },
                            s = {};
                        this.measurementId && Object.assign(s, {
                            send_to: this.measurementId
                        }),
                        i && Object.assign(s, i);
                        const a = {
                            ecommerce: o
                        };
                        Object.keys(s).length && Object.assign(a, {
                            common: s
                        });
                        try {
                            this.trySendGa4Event(t, a)
                        } catch (c) {
                            Ar("form #" + this.formId + " Google Analytics integration failed:", c)
                        }
                    }
                    transform(t, e)
                    {
                        try {
                            return {
                                item_id: t.ids[this.shopId],
                                item_name: t.displayName,
                                item_list_name: this.listName,
                                item_brand: t.manufacturer ? t.manufacturer.name : "",
                                price: t.price,
                                index: e + 1,
                                quantity: 1
                            }
                        } catch (n) {
                            return void Ar("form #" + this.formId + " Google Analytics integration failed:", n)
                        }
                    }
                }

                    async sendRequest(t, e, n)
                    {
                        if (!t)
                            return [];

                                this.reportSlaSuccess()

                                })
                            }(t, r);

                        } catch (o) {

                                const t = function(t, e, n, i) {
                                    let r = "unknownError",
                                        o = {};

                                    if (s.test(e.errorMessage))
                                        r = "endpointInvalid",

                                            endpoint: e.errorMessage.replace(s, "$1"),
                                            site: document.location.host
                                        };

                                        r = "productNotFound";

                                            productId: String(e || "undefined")
                                        }

                                        }
                                    }

                                        type: r,
                                        payload: o,
                                        url: document.location.href
                                    }
                                }(this.behaviorSettings.shopId, o, e, r);
                                this.reportMbError(t)
                            }
                            throw o
                        }
                    }

                const Uh = 604800;
                function Hh({timerSettings: t, showTime: e}) {
                    switch (t.type) {
                    case "end":
                        return t.end.date;
                    case "range":
                        return "visit" === t.range.start ? e + t.range.duration : Number(t.range.start) + t.range.duration;
                    case "cycle":
                        {
                            const e = t.cycle;
                            if (!e || !e.day || !e.day.length)
                                return 0;

                                i = (24 * n.getUTCDay() * 60 * 60 + 60 * n.getUTCHours() * 60 + 60 * n.getUTCMinutes() + n.getUTCSeconds()) % Uh,
                                r = e.time.split(":"),

                                c = !a.length,
                                u = c ? s[s.length - 1] : a[a.length - 1],
                                l = i - u + (c ? Uh : 0);
                            return Math.round((new Date).getTime() / 1e3) - l + e.duration
                        }default:
                        return 0
                    }
                }

                                }
                            }), t

                    }

                    }

                    constructor(t, e)

                            })

                    _handleInappClick(e)
                    {
                        if (!this.mobileSdkProvider || !this.view)
                            return;
                        const n = e.target.closest(`[${t.INAPP_CLICK_ATTRIBUTE}]`);
                        if (!n)
                            return;
                        e.preventDefault();
                        const i = n.getAttribute(t.INAPP_CLICK_ATTRIBUTE) ?? "";
                        let r;
                        try {
                            const t = JSON.parse(i);
                            if (!t || "object" != typeof t || "string" != typeof t.intentPayload || "string" != typeof t.value || "string" != typeof t.$type)
                                throw new Error("Invalid InappClickData");
                            r = t
                        } catch {
                            return this.mobileSdkProvider.bridgeMessagesHandlers.send("close", {
                                payload: {
                                    reason: "invalid-click-data"
                                }
                            }), void this.view.close()
                        }
                        this.mobileSdkProvider.bridgeMessagesHandlers.send("click", {
                            payload: r
                        }),
                        this.mobileSdkProvider.utils.tracking.trackClick(),
                        this.view.close()
                    }
                    _handleInappFollow(e)
                    {
                        if (!this.mobileSdkProvider || !this.view)
                            return;
                        const n = e.target.closest(`[${t.INAPP_FOLLOW_ATTRIBUTE}]`);
                        if (!n)
                            return;
                        e.preventDefault();
                        const i = n.getAttribute(t.INAPP_FOLLOW_ATTRIBUTE) ?? "";
                        this.mobileSdkProvider.bridgeMessagesHandlers.send("click", {
                            payload: {
                                intentPayload: "",
                                value: i,
                                $type: "redirectUrl"
                            }
                        }),
                        this.mobileSdkProvider.utils.tracking.trackClick(),
                        this.view.close()
                    }
                    _handleInappCopy(e)
                    {
                        if (!this.mobileSdkProvider || !this.view)
                            return;
                        const n = e.target.closest(`[${t.INAPP_COPY_ATTRIBUTE}]`);
                        if (!n)
                            return;

                            payload: {
                                intentPayload: i,
                                value: "",
                                $type: "redirectUrl"
                            }
                        }),
                        this.mobileSdkProvider.utils.tracking.trackClick(),
                        this.view.close()
                    }
                    getSettings()
                    {
                        return {
                            mobileSdkProvider: this.mobileSdkProvider
                        }
                    }
                }

                        addEventListener(t, e) {
                            let n = sf.get(t);
                            n || (n = new Set, sf.set(t, n)),
                            n.add(e)
                        },
                        removeEventListener(t, e) {
                            const n = sf.get(t);
                            n && (n.delete(e), 0 === n.size && sf.delete(t))
                        },
                        emit(t, e) {
                            const n = sf.get(t);
                            if (!n || 0 === n.size)
                                return;
                            const i = Array.from(n);
                            for (const o of i)
                                try {
                                    o(e)
                                } catch (r) {
                                    Nr.log(`personalizationEvents: handler for "${t}" threw`, r)
                                }
                        },
                        _reset() {
                            sf.clear()
                        }

                                        this.matcherMode = new Wl({
                                            quizId: this.config.internalId,
                                            categoryId: this.config.structure.internalId,
                                            deviceUuid: n ?? "",
                                            endpointId: e ?? "",
                                            $elem: t,
                                            productCardType: this.config.recommendation?.productCard.type,
                                            previewEnabled: this.config.recommendation?.preview?.enabled ?? !0,
                                            sortingEnabled: this.config.recommendation?.sorting?.enabled ?? !0,
                                            onRestart: () => {
                                                this.navigator?.restart(),
                                                this.actUuid = void 0,
                                                this.actUuidDateTimeUtc = void 0
                                            }
                                        })
                                    }
                                    return this.renderCurrentScreen()
                                }
                            }
                            updateProgressBar()
                            {
                                const t = this.navigator.currentQuestion;
                                if (!t)
                                    return;
                                const e = this.navigator.currentAnsweredCount,
                                    n = e + function(t, e) {
                                        const n = t.reduce((t, e) => (t[e.systemName] = e, t), {}),
                                            i = {};
                                        return function t(e, r, o) {
                                            if (!e || "finish" === e)
                                                return r;
                                            if (o[e])
                                                return r;
                                            if (void 0 !== i[e])
                                                return r + i[e];
                                            o[e] = !0;
                                            const s = n[e];
                                            let a = r;
                                            if (s)
                                                if ("scale" === s.type || "single" === s.type)
                                                    for (const n of s.options) {
                                                        const e = t(n.nextSystemName, r + 1, o);
                                                        a = Math.max(a, e)
                                                    }
                                                else if ("nextSystemName" in s && s.nextSystemName) {
                                                    const e = t(s.nextSystemName, r + 1, o);
                                                    a = Math.max(a, e)
                                                }
                                            return o[e] = !1, i[e] = a - r, a
                                        }(e.systemName, 0, {})
                                    }(this.config.structure.questions, t),
                                    i = Math.round(e / n * 100);
                                "settings" in this.view.form.settings && (this.view.form.settings.settings.form_passing_percentage = i)
                            }
                            initActUuidIfNeeded()
                            {
                                this.actUuid || (this.actUuid = ml(), this.actUuidDateTimeUtc = (new Date).toISOString())
                            }
                            triggerQuizAnswer()
                            {
                                this.view && this.navigator && Jr.trigger("quizAnswer", {
                                    form: this.view.form,
                                    quizConfig: this.config,
                                    answers: this.navigator.getAllAnswers(),
                                    actUuid: this.actUuid,
                                    actUuidDateTimeUtc: this.actUuidDateTimeUtc
                                })
                            }
                            async renderCurrentScreen()
                            {
                                const t = this.navigator.currentPhase;
                                if (t === El.Finished)
                                    return void (this.isMatcher ? this.matcherMode.renderFinish(this.navigator.getAllAnswers()) : await (async t => {
                                        const {final: e, view: n, $elem: i, formFactor: r} = t;
                                        void 0 !== e && "settings" in n.form.settings && (n.form.settings.settings.finish_data = [e]);
                                        const o = (await n.renderWithEnrichedSettings()).find(yl),
                                            s = o.find(".quiz-button-next:not(.matcher-final-restart)"),
                                            a = s.hasClass("quiz-button-next-link"),
                                            c = r === Cl.INLINE;
                                        a && c || s.on("click", () => {
                                            n.close()
                                        });
                                        const u = i.find(yl).closest(`[data-${cn.DATASET_PREFIX}-screen]`);
                                        i.find(yl).replaceWith(o),
                                        i.find(`[data-${cn.DATASET_PREFIX}-screen]`).removeClass(gl),
                                        u.addClass(gl)
                                    })({
                                        final: Rl(this.navigator.getAllAnswers(), this.config.structure.questions, this.config?.finals),
                                        view: this.view,
                                        $elem: this.$elem,
                                        formFactor: this.config?.formFactor
                                    }));
                                if (t === El.Contacts) {
                                    const t = await (async t => {
                                        const {view: e, paywall: n, lead: i, $elem: r, onSkip: o} = t;
                                        await e.form.init.quizzesPaywallFieldsReady;
                                        const s = e.form.init.quizzesPaywallFields,
                                            a = s ? {
                                                ...n,
                                                fields: n.fields.filter(t => !s[t]?.present)
                                            } : n,
                                            c = 1 === a.fields.length && "name" === a.fields[0];
                                        if (0 === a.fields.length || c)
                                            return o(), null;
                                        "settings" in e.form.settings && (e.form.settings.settings.contacts_data = {
                                            ...a,
                                            ...i
                                        });
                                        const u = (await e.renderWithEnrichedSettings()).find(vl),
                                            l = r.find(vl).closest(`[data-${cn.DATASET_PREFIX}-screen]`);
                                        r.find(vl).replaceWith(u),
                                        Il(u),
                                        r.find(`[data-${cn.DATASET_PREFIX}-screen]`).removeClass(gl),
                                        l.addClass(gl);
                                        const d = "optional" === a.mode;
                                        return l.find(".quiz-button-skip").off("click").toggle(d).on("click", o), l
                                    })({
                                        paywall: this.config.paywall,
                                        lead: this.config.lead,
                                        view: this.view,
                                        $elem: this.$elem,
                                        onSkip: () => this.navigator.finish()
                                    });
                                    if (!t)
                                        return;
                                    return void this.$elem[0].dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent("quiz:contacts-screen-shown", {
                                        bubbles: !0,
                                        detail: {
                                            $contactsScreen: t,
                                            onSubmit: () => this.navigator.finish()
                                        }
                                    }))
                                }
                                const e = this.navigator.currentQuestion;
                                if (!e)
                                    return;
                                this.updateProgressBar();
                                const n = this.navigator.prefillAnswer,
                                    i = n?.question === e.systemName ? n.answer : void 0;
                                await kl({
                                    question: e,
                                    existingAnswer: i,
                                    $elem: this.$elem,
                                    view: this.view,
                                    isFirstQuestion: this.navigator.isFirstQuestion,
                                    autoAdvance: this.isMatcher,
                                    onAnswer: t => {
                                        this.initActUuidIfNeeded(),
                                        this.navigator.onAnswer(e.systemName, t)
                                    },
                                    onNext: () => {
                                        this.navigator.goNext(),
                                        this.triggerQuizAnswer()
                                    },
                                    onPrev: () => {
                                        this.navigator.goPrev(),
                                        this.triggerQuizAnswer()
                                    }
                                }),
                                this.matcherMode?.onQuestionShown(this.navigator.getAllAnswers(), e.image),
                                this.$elem[0].dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent("quiz:question-shown", {
                                    bubbles: !0
                                }))
                            }
                        }

                        popup: class  extends iu{
                            constructor(t)
                            {
                                super(t),
                                this.name = "popup";
                                const e = kt({}, "behavior_settings" in t.form.settings ? t.form.settings.behavior_settings?.popup : {}, {
                                    paranja_opacity: .3,

                                        from: "top"
                                    }
                                });
                                this.animationType = e.animation_type || "slide",
                                this.animationSettings = e.animation_settings || {
                                    from: "top"
                                },
                                this.paranjaOpacity = e.paranja_opacity || .3
                            }
                            _prepareAnimation(t)
                            {
                                if ("slide" === this.animationType) {
                                    const e = {};
                                    e["margin-" + (this.animationSettings.from || "top")] = -Math.max(window.innerWidth, window.innerHeight),
                                    t.css(e)
                                } else
                                    this._initialOpacity = t.css("opacity") || 1,
                                    t.css({
                                        opacity: 0
                                    })
                            }
                            _runPopupAnimation(t, e)
                            {
                                const n = {};
                                "slide" === this.animationType ? n["margin-" + this.animationSettings.from] = 0 : n.opacity = this._initialOpacity,
                                t.animate(n, {
                                    duration: cn.ANIMATION_SPEED,
                                    queue: !1,
                                    always: e
                                })
                            }
                            onRender(t, e, n)
                            {
                                const i = this._filterForm(t),
                                    r = An(`<div class="${cn.CSS_PREFIX}js-wrapper ${cn.CSS_PREFIX}wrapper"></div>`);
                                this._$formWrapper = r,
                                n.append(r),
                                this._$paranja = An(`<div class="${cn.CSS_PREFIX}js-paranja" id="${cn.CSS_PREFIX}paranja-${this.formId}">`).css({
                                    display: "block",
                                    position: "absolute",
                                    top: "0",
                                    left: "0",
                                    bottom: "0",
                                    right: "0",
                                    "background-color": "black",
                                    opacity: "0",
                                    pointerEvents: "all",
                                    "z-index": 1e6
                                }),
                                r.append(this._$paranja),
                                r.css({
                                    position: "relative",
                                    "text-align": "center",
                                    margin: "0",
                                    top: 0,
                                    left: 0,
                                    right: 0
                                }),
                                i.css({
                                    display: "inline-block",
                                    "z-index": 100000002,
                                    position: "relative",
                                    "vertical-align": "middle",
                                    "text-align": "left"
                                }),
                                this._prepareAnimation(r)
                            }
                            onShow(t, e)
                            {
                                const n = this._getForm(t),
                                    i = this._$formWrapper,
                                    r = this._getContainer(t),
                                    o = this._$paranja;
                                xu.disableScroll(),
                                this._$formWrapper.append(n),
                                requestAnimationFrame(() => {
                                    r.css({
                                        position: "fixed",
                                        top: 0,
                                        left: 0,
                                        right: 0,
                                        bottom: 0,
                                        height: "auto",
                                        "min-height": 0,
                                        overflow: "auto",
                                        "z-index": 1e8
                                    }),
                                    this._$vaHelper = An('<div style="display: block !important;"></div>'),
                                    this._$vaHelper.css({
                                        height: window.innerHeight,
                                        display: "inline-block",
                                        width: 0,
                                        "vertical-align": "middle"
                                    }).appendTo(i),
                                    An(window).on("resize", () => {
                                        this._$vaHelper.css({
                                            height: window.innerHeight
                                        })
                                    }),
                                    o.animate({
                                        opacity: this.paranjaOpacity
                                    }, {
                                        duration: cn.ANIMATION_SPEED,
                                        queue: !1
                                    }),
                                    this._runPopupAnimation(i, () => {
                                        o.on("click", () => {
                                            e.close(!1)
                                        }),
                                        n.find(`.${cn.CSS_PREFIX}close, [data-popmechanic-close]`).on("click", function() {
                                            e.close(An(this).data("popmechanic-close"))
                                        })
                                    }),
                                    An(document).on("keyup", t => {
                                        27 == t.keyCode && e.close()
                                    })
                                })
                            }
                            onClose(t)
                            {
                                const e = this._getContainer(t);
                                return new Promise(n => {
                                    t.animate({
                                        top: "-50%"
                                    }, cn.ANIMATION_SPEED, () => {
                                        this._$paranja && this._$paranja.animate({
                                            opacity: "0"
                                        }, cn.ANIMATION_SPEED, () => {
                                            this._$paranja?.remove(),
                                            this._$vaHelper?.remove(),
                                            this._$formWrapper?.remove(),
                                            e.css({
                                                position: "static",
                                                height: 0,
                                                "min-height": 0
                                            }),
                                            xu.enableScroll(),
                                            n()
                                        })
                                    })
                                })
                            }
                            onSuccess(t) {}
                            onFail() {}
                        }
